hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r file; echo "$file" | grep -qE "^$HOME/\.claude/skills/[^/]+/SKILL\.md$" || exit 0; name=$(grep -m1 '^name:' "$file" | sed 's/^name:[[:space:]]*//' ); desc=$(grep -m1 '^description:' "$file" | sed 's/^description:[[:space:]]*//' | cut -c1-50); last=$(grep -oE '\| [0-9]+ \|' ~/.claude/ai-capabilities.md | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | sort -n | tail -1); next=$((${last:-0}+1)); echo "| $name | $desc | skill | $next |" >> ~/.claude/ai-capabilities.md; } 2>/dev/null || true
